title: Lok Nayak Hospital Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 14 Posts
short_info: The Lok Nayak Hospital has officially announced the Senior Resident Recruitment 2026 with 14 openings. The detailed notification was published at the official website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 45 years and hold MBBS with Post Graduate Degree/DNB/Diploma or Post Doctoral Degree (or equivalent) in the concerned specialty from an NMC/MCI recognized university/institute with preferably DMC registration can attend the Walk-in Interview on 29 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and attend the walk-in interview are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 45 years Age Relaxation: 3 years for OBC candidates, 5 years for SC/ST candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with Post Graduate Degree/DNB/Diploma or Post Doctoral Degree
qualification.details: MBBS with Post Graduate Degree/DNB/Diploma or Post Doctoral Degree (or equivalent) in the concerned specialty from an NMC/MCI recognized university/institute and preferably possess DMC registration.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Lok Nayak Hospital Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Senior Resident posts at Lok Nayak Hospital is scheduled for 29th May 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Senior Resident posts at Lok Nayak Hospital?
faq.answer: Lok Nayak Hospital has announced a total of 14 vacancies for the Senior Resident positions across various specialties.

faq.question: Q3. What are the educational qualifications required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree with a Post Graduate Degree/DNB/Diploma or Post Doctoral Degree in the concerned specialty from an NMC/MCI recognized university/institute. DMC registration is preferred.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Senior Resident posts is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the Lok Nayak Hospital Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Senior Resident posts will receive a salary in the pay scale of Rs. 67,700 to Rs. 2,08,700 per month.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the Senior Resident positions at Lok Nayak Hospital?
faq.answer: The application process is through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to attend the interview with all required documents on the specified date.

faq.question: Q8. What documents do I need to carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if any), and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Resident posts at Lok Nayak Hospital will be based on an Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' heading.
